name: flutter-go-to-market-toolkit
description: Launch your Flutter app to Google Play Store and Apple App Store in 24 hours — guided lifecycle with CI/CD pipelines, testing tracks, store listings, monetization, code push, and validation gates.

plugins.name: flutter-go-to-market
plugins.description: Guided Flutter app launch lifecycle: 4 spaces (Code Readiness, Pipeline & Signing, Store Preparation, Launch) with validation gates. 1 command, 8 auto-activating skills, 2 agents. Covers Codemagic/GitHub Actions CI/CD, Google Play + App Store setup, RevenueCat monetization, Shorebird code push, TestFlight, BrowserStack, and pre-launch checklist based on Andrea Bizzotto's methodology.
